topPlaces.name: Agaram
topPlaces.description: Agaram is a neighbourhood of Perambur and a developed residential area in North Chennai, a metropolitan city in Tamil Nadu, India.

topPlaces.name: Jawahar Nagar
topPlaces.description: Jawahar Nagar (Tamil: ஜவஹர் நகர்), named after the first Prime Minister of India, Jawaharlal Nehru, is a developed residential area in North Chennai, a metropolitan city in Tamil Nadu, India.

topPlaces.name: Spectrum Mall (Chennai)
topPlaces.description: Spectrum Mall (formerly known as Grand Venus Mall) is a shopping mall located in Perambur, Chennai, India. It is the first mall in North Chennai.

topPlaces.name: Venus, Chennai
topPlaces.description: Venus (Tamil: வீனஸ்), is a small neighbourhood of Perambur and a commercial area in North Chennai, a metropolitan city in Tamil Nadu, India. The small area around erstwhile Venus Theatre is called Venus unofficially by the people around Perambur.

topPlaces.name: Peravallur
topPlaces.description: Peravallur is a developed residential area, located on the north - western corner of Madras (renamed to Chennai), a metropolitan city in Tamil Nadu state, India. Out of 1018 places to be renamed by the government of Tamil Nadu, Peravallur is the one to be renamed as "Peravalloor".

topPlaces.name: Siruvallur
topPlaces.description: Siruvallur (Tamil: சிறுவள்ளூர்), is a small neighbourhood of Perambur and a developed residential area in North Chennai, a metropolitan city in Tamil Nadu, India.

topPlaces.name: Periyar Nagar
topPlaces.description: Periyar Nagar, is a developed residential area in North Chennai, a metropolitan city, which is developed in short time in Tamil Nadu, India.

items.note: Agaram is a neighbourhood of Perambur and a developed residential area in North Chennai, a metropolitan city in Tamil Nadu, India.
Jawahar Nagar (Tamil: ஜவஹர் நகர்), named after the first Prime Minister of India, Jawaharlal Nehru, is a developed residential area in North Chennai, a metropolitan city in Tamil Nadu, India.
Spectrum Mall (formerly known as Grand Venus Mall) is a shopping mall located in Perambur, Chennai, India. It is the first mall in North Chennai.

Venus (Tamil: வீனஸ்), is a small neighbourhood of Perambur and a commercial area in North Chennai, a metropolitan city in Tamil Nadu, India. The small area around erstwhile Venus Theatre is called Venus unofficially by the people around Perambur.

Peravallur is a developed residential area, located on the north - western corner of Madras (renamed to Chennai), a metropolitan city in Tamil Nadu state, India. Out of 1018 places to be renamed by the government of Tamil Nadu, Peravallur is the one to be renamed as "Peravalloor".
Siruvallur (Tamil: சிறுவள்ளூர்), is a small neighbourhood of Perambur and a developed residential area in North Chennai, a metropolitan city in Tamil Nadu, India.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Peravallur Sundararaja Perumal Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Peravallur Sundararaja Perumal Temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Peravallur Sundararaja Perumal Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Chennai International Airport (15 km) and the nearest railway station is Chennai Central (6 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Peravallur Sundararaja Perumal Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Peravallur Sundararaja Perumal Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Peravallur Sundararaja Perumal Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Peravallur Sundararaja Perumal Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Peravallur Sundararaja Perumal Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Agaram, Jawahar Nagar, Spectrum Mall (Chennai), Venus, Chennai, Peravallur.
